case_title: MORRISON, ROBERT VS MERRICK BANK CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PLFT'S EX PARTE REQUEST IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDIC BECAUSE THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT DEFT IS DOING BUSINESS IN CA OR THAT THERE ARE SUFFICIENT
CORRESPONDANCE FROM ROBERT MORRISON RECEIVED AND FILED. SERVICE OF PLTF'S CLAIM MADE ON DEFT MEETRICK BANK CORP.
DECL OF ROBERT MORRISON IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE OF PROCESS FILED SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
CONTRACTS WITH CA TO SUBJECT DEFT TO THE JURISDICTION OF CA'S COURT.
ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST TO SERVE DEFENDANT BY SERVICE ON THE CA SECRETARY OF STATE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,867.50 FILED BY MORRISON, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MERRICK BANK CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-2001, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT MERRICK BANK CORPORATION
